title: OHT Track Path Definition (Curved Path)
description: Curved path definition for OHT_TRACK with points and segments (REQ-TC-003, REQ-TC-012). This schema ONLY applies to paths using points+segments structure (OHT_TRACK, CUSTOM_PATH). AGV_NETWORK uses a separate nodes+edges schema (not defined in this file).

pathPoint.description: A point in 3D space that can be referenced by path segments. All coordinates in meters (REQ-TC-004).

id.description: Unique point identifier for reference by segments

bezierControlPoint.description: Bezier control point (c1 or c2). These are GEOMETRIC control points only, NOT traffic ControlPoints (REQ-TC-003). Coordinates are absolute in meters.

linearSegment.description: LINEAR segment: straight line between two points (REQ-TC-003)

from.description: Start point ID (must reference a point in the points array)

to.description: End point ID (must reference a point in the points array)

bezierSegment.description: BEZIER segment: cubic Bezier curve with two control points (REQ-TC-003). Control points are absolute coordinates in meters.

from.description: Start point ID (must reference a point in the points array)

to.description: End point ID (must reference a point in the points array)

c1.description: Control point 1 (absolute coordinates in meters). This is a GEOMETRIC control point for curve shape, NOT a traffic ControlPoint.

c2.description: Control point 2 (absolute coordinates in meters). This is a GEOMETRIC control point for curve shape, NOT a traffic ControlPoint.

controlPoint.description: Traffic control point for capacity/priority management (REQ-TC-005). This is distinct from Bezier geometric control points.

at.description: Point ID where this control point is located (must reference a point in the points array)

capacity.description: Maximum number of vehicles that can occupy this control point simultaneously

priority.description: Priority level for this control point (1-10, where 10 is highest)

path.description: OHT track path definition with points and segments (REQ-TC-003, REQ-TC-012). For AGV_NETWORK (nodes+edges structure), a separate schema is required (not defined in this file).

type.description: Path type. OHT_TRACK for OHT tracks with curved paths. CUSTOM_PATH for custom curved paths. NOTE: AGV_NETWORK is NOT supported here (use nodes+edges structure).

points.description: Collection of path points that can be referenced by segments. All coordinates in meters (REQ-TC-004).

segments.description: Ordered list of path segments (LINEAR or BEZIER). Each segment's from/to must reference point IDs in the points array. Segments must be continuous (previous segment's 'to' = current segment's 'from').

controlPoints.description: Optional traffic control points for capacity/priority management (REQ-TC-005). These are distinct from Bezier geometric control points (c1, c2 in BEZIER segments).
